pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-K-013 (Risk and Compliance/Knowledge) scores 0.412 composite (highest: NICE at 0.412) and is in_scope for the Data Classification Specialist role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level Data Classification Specialist.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (Risk and Compliance) at composite 0.412. Edge domain inclusion threshold is ≥0.42 for Data Classification Specialist.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (Risk and Compliance) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.412 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk and Compliance KSA (composite 0.412)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Classification Specialist job postings does not surface this Risk and Compliance competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
